channel.title: Saer Zulkarnain
channel.description: Unofficial RSS feed for Saer Zulkarnain

item.title: Vehicles are supposed to be empty when entering or leaving the ferry, but rules ...
item.description: Vehicles are supposed to be empty when entering or leaving the ferry, but rules don’t seem to matter anymore. Even though there are authorities meant to enforce these procedures, they might as well not exist. Millions of lives are literally in the hands of unprofessional, poorly trained drivers on daily basis. Rail authorities routinely forget to put barriers at crossings, and as a result, transport services packed with people end up being slaughtered on the tracks—with no one held accountable. The people in high office never face any consequences. Even aircraft's are flown by pilots who forged their flying records. We have factories, government offices, banks, shopping malls, media outlets, and restaurants without proper fire exits, and when a fire breaks out, we end up burned alive. Such is the reality of Bangladesh.

item.title: আল জাজিরার ইনভেস্টিগেটিভ ইউনিট (আই-ইউনিট)-এর অনুসন্ধানে উঠে এসেছে বাংলাদেশের সাব...
item.description: আল জাজিরার ইনভেস্টিগেটিভ ইউনিট (আই-ইউনিট)-এর অনুসন্ধানে উঠে এসেছে বাংলাদেশের সাবেক প্রধানমন্ত্রী শেখ হাসিনা কর্তৃক, ২০২৪ এর রক্তাক্ত ছাত্র আন্দোলন দমনের লক্ষ্যে নির্দয় গোপন নির্দেশাবলির বিস্তারিত। #হাসিনা৩৬জুলাই
